{{Infobox character
| name = Tamara
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Alin's party}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Tamara is a woman characterized by her long hair and a generally composed, placid demeanor. She demonstrates a polite and respectful attitude toward [[Grandmaster Naraka]], though she is also capable of being sharp-tongued when addressing others. In her daily activities, she has been observed working as a cook, specifically kneading dough. Tamara possesses a tendency to interrupt conversations to address central issues directly, often without appearing to focus on the dialogue. During a confrontation involving [[Alin]], she was physically overpowered by an entity and struck with enough force to throw her against a brick wall.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|As [[Alin]]'s oldest sister, Tamara serves as a companion to him throughout his journey. While traveling with her travel-bag, she joins [[Alin]]'s party and carries a seed destined for the [[Hanging Tree]]. During an encounter with [[Grandmaster Naraka]], she is seized by the [[Naraka Incarnation]]. In the struggle, the [[Incarnation]] strikes Tamara in the ribs with its flame-headed hammer.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] is [[Alin]]'s oldest sister.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] is a character who interacts with [[Alin]] and [[Grandmaster Naraka]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] is a companion of [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] is part of [[Alin]]'s party and carries a seed to the [[Hanging Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] grabbed [[Tamara]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] was hit in the ribs by the [[Incarnation]]'s flame-headed hammer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Tamara]] has a travel-bag.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Tamara spent half her time chuckling and the other half shaking her head..."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
